content.body:
- Python: detect class methods vs top-level functions by checking
  grandparent node (block → class_definition); class methods now emit
  kind "method" instead of "function"
- Python: extract inline docstrings from function_definition and
  class_definition bodies; stored as "doc" in draft content
- TypeScript: add interface_declaration to query so interfaces are
  extracted with kind "interface" (both exported and bare forms)
- JavaScript/TypeScript: extract leading // comment blocks above
  declarations for all query-based languages via extractLeadingComment
- Updated sample.py, sample.ts, sample.js fixtures; added three new
  focused tests (Python class method kind, Python docstring, TS interface)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): improve per-language AST extraction (#79)

  kind "method" in...
